Cluster: Degraded — 2/4 nodes Ready
  ✗ node worker-2 NotReady: KubeletNotReady — container runtime is down
  ✗ node worker-3 SchedulingDisabled
  ✗ node worker-1 kubelet not heartbeating (lease 95s stale)
  ✗ node db-01 expected but absent from the cluster
  ✗ system kube-system/coredns Degraded 1/2
  Needs attention: 14 workloads failing (7 ⇐ 4 root causes) · 2 services without endpoints · 1 ingress route broken · 1 PVC failing to provision · 2 resources stuck terminating · 1 PodDisruptionBudget blocking drains · 1 HPA can't scale · 1 admission webhook failing

NEEDS ATTENTION

      ⚠ StuckTerminating: NamespaceFinalizersRemaining — some content has finalizers remaining: kubernetes

      ⚠ StuckTerminating: finalizer example.com/cleanup-hook
  ✗ shop/api-pdb  PodDisruptionBudget  minAvailable: 3
      ⚠ PDBBlocked: covers all 3 pods — no voluntary eviction can ever proceed; every node drain will hang
  ✗ shop/api-hpa  HorizontalPodAutoscaler  targets Deployment/api
      ⚠ HPAStuck: can't fetch metrics — unable to get resource metric cpu: no metrics returned
  ✗ policy-webhook  ValidatingWebhookConfiguration  webhook validate.policy.io
      ⚠ WebhookDown: backend Service kube-system/policy-svc has no ready endpoints — failurePolicy Fail rejects every intercepted create/update

SECURITY  (advisory — does not affect the cluster verdict)
  2 baseline · 1 exposed service · 18 restricted hardening gaps · 7 workloads

  ✗ shop/legacy-agent  Deployment
      [baseline] Privileged — container "agent" runs privileged (full host access)
      [baseline] HostPath — mounts hostPath /var/run (writable host filesystem)
  ✗ shop/payments  Service
      [kubeagent] ExposedService — type NodePort exposes port(s) 80 externally

  restricted (hardening gaps, near-universal): 18 across 6 workloads
    RunAsRoot ×6 · AllowPrivilegeEscalation ×6 · CapabilitiesNotDropped ×6
    → run with --security-verbose to list every finding per workload

KUBELET HEALTH  (opt-in)
  ✗ node worker-2 kubelet /healthz unhealthy: [-]syncloop failed
CERTIFICATES  (advisory — public certificate metadata only)
  ✗ shop/shop-tls  EXPIRED 3d ago  (CN shop.example.com)
      — fronts ingress shop/storefront (shop.example.com)
  ⚠ infra/api-tls  expires in 12d  (CN api.example.com)
  · 3 certificates checked (warn window 30d)
NOTES
  • 2 nodes reserve no memory: worker-1, worker-2
      — OS/kubelet memory pressure can destabilize the node
  • 2 nodes reserve no ephemeral-storage: worker-1, worker-2
      — disk pressure can destabilize the node
  • 1 PVC on Delete reclaim policy — standard ×1   [--pvc-reclaim]
  • shop/internal-metrics  ClusterIP  no ready endpoints
  • ingress shop/dashboard  dash.example.com/  backend Service grafana is intentionally empty (scaled to 0) — route parked

CONTEXT
Kubelet reservations (combined kube+system)
  memory            2 of 2 nodes reserve none  ⚠
  cpu               2 of 2 nodes reserve none
  ephemeral-storage 2 of 2 nodes reserve none  ⚠
Resources (cluster):
  CPU     8.0 cores · req 2.0 (25%) · lim 4.0 (50%) · used 2.0 (25%)
  Memory  16Gi · req 4Gi (25%) · lim 8Gi (50%) · used 4Gi (25%)

Platform: Cilium CNI · Traefik ingress · Hetzner CSI (+NFS CSI) storage · Kubernetes v1.35 (RKE2) · containerd · Hetzner Cloud
